sections.paragraph:
ρυθμίζω (ρυθμίζω,)
Etym. ρυθμός

to bring into measure or proportion: generally, to order, to educate, train, Xen., etc.:—metaph., ρ. λύπην ὅπου to define the place of grief, Soph.:—Mid., ρ. πλόκαμον to arrange one's hair, Eur.:—Pass., νηλεῶς ὧδ' ἐρρύθμισμαι thus ruthlessly am I brought to order, Aesch.
